title: Plasmid-reprogramming of human fibroblasts

steps: Prepare nucleofection solution: %s %s Human Dermal Fibroblast Nucleofector solution 82 µL Supplement 18 µl Plasmid 10 µg
Nucleofect 700.000 fibroblasts (resuspended in the nucleofection solution) with the P-022 program.
Distribute nucleofected fibroblasts on a 6-Well plate, coated with Matrigel.
Culture cells in DMEM + GlutaMAX supplement (Gibco) + 10 % FBS (Gibco) without P/S.
Change medium to DMEM + GlutaMAX supplement + 10% FBS + 2 ng/mL FGF2 (Peprotech) with 1% P/S (Millipore).
Change medium to E8 medium + 100 micromolar (µM) Sodium Butyrate (Sigma Aldrich 303410-100G) + 0.1 % P/S and change medium every other day.
Pick iPS cell colonies. Note : First colonies should appear around Day 14.
creator: Federico Bertoli
